parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as MA #LightBlue
note over MA: Hub operator or\nDFSP interactions

box "Central-Settlement" #White
participant "API" as API #E6E6FA
note over API: NodeJS interface\ninvokes REST API
participant "api / Handler" as Handler #E6E6FA
note over Handler: JSON request decoded &\nprocessed via handler
participant "Application Layer\n(domain / service / facade)" as AppLayer #E6E6FA
note over AppLayer: Expose service functions &\nhandle database interactions
end box

box "Storage" #White
participant "TigerBeetle Client" as TBClient #E8F5E9
participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as TBCluster #E8F5E9
database "MySQL" as MySQL #E6F2FF
end box

group Update Settlement
    MA -> API: 1 //JSON//\n**(settlement data)**
    API -> Handler: 2 Invoke handler
    Handler -> AppLayer: 3 Invoke application layer
    AppLayer --> MySQL: 4 Retrieve settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    AppLayer <--> TBClient: 5 Retrieve accounts for all //Transfers//\nfor a settlement window
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 6 Update settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    AppLayer -> AppLayer: 7 Settlement state\nprocessing
    AppLayer -> TBClient: 8 Invoke account creation based on\nsettlement state of each //Transfer//
    TBClient <--> TBCluster: 9 Create settlement accounts\n& return result
    TBClient --> AppLayer: 10 Return settlement result
    AppLayer <--> MySQL: 11 Update final settlement state\n& return result
    AppLayer --> Handler: 12 Return result
    Handler --> API: 13 Return result
    API --> MA: 14 Return result with\n//settlementData//
end
@enduml
```
